provenance.source_corpus: On the Use of Shallow Basins to Restore Cutover Peatlands: Plant Establishment

source_spans.text: shallow basins were generally effective at promoting Sphagnum establishment
shallow basins were generally effective at promoting Sphagnum establishment
Shallow basins and adjacent peat ridges act to retain water
Soil-moisture content (linear positive effect) ... were shown to be determinant of plant recovery
surface roughness (negative effect) were also instrumental in explaining local variation in Sphagnum cover

nodes.name: duration and severity of flooding events

source_spans.text: duration and severity of flooding events (quadratic effect) were shown to be determinant of plant recovery
density of straw cover (positive effect) ... were also instrumental in explaining local variation in Sphagnum cover
surface roughness (negative effect) were also instrumental in explaining local variation in Sphagnum cover
Plant cover after three and four growing seasons averaged ... 40–60% in manual reintroductions
